items.briefing:
Ransomware attacks are approaching record levels globally, with criminal groups becoming more organised and harder to defend against — a direct concern for Australian training organisations that hold sensitive student and staff data. Separately, Canvas (Instructure), a learning platform widely used in Australian education, confirmed it reached an agreement with hackers who stole student data, paying them to delete it. While the immediate threat may be contained, this highlights that education platforms are active targets.

Microsoft released its monthly security updates yesterday with no critical zero-day threats identified, so now is a good time to apply updates without urgency pressure.

**Tip:** If your organisation uses Canvas or any cloud learning platform, check with your IT team that your data-sharing settings and access permissions are reviewed regularly.
